name: Astro
excerpt: Astro is the web framework for content-driven websites. Server-first rendering with minimal JavaScript, supporting React, Vue, Svelte, and more.

name: Adobe
excerpt: Adobe is the global leader in digital media and marketing solutions. Partnership focuses on Adobe Experience Manager (AEM) for content management and Adobe Commerce for eCommerce.

name: BigCommerce
excerpt: BigCommerce is a flexible enterprise ecommerce platform built for growth without compromise. Open SaaS architecture enabling brands and B2B sellers to scale freely.

name: ButterCMS
excerpt: ButterCMS is an API-first headless CMS that integrates into any web project in minutes. Marketers get a content dashboard they love, developers get clean REST and GraphQL APIs.

name: Contentful
excerpt: Contentful is a composable content platform for creating, managing, and delivering digital content across channels. AI-powered personalization and modular content architecture.

name: HubSpot
excerpt: HubSpot offers an all-in-one customer platform with marketing, sales, service, and CMS tools that start free and scale. AI-powered automation with business-specific context.

name: Hyva
excerpt: Hyva creates modern, high-performance frontend solutions for Magento and Adobe Commerce. Lightweight open-source theme framework trusted by 6,400+ live stores.

name: Run Free Project
excerpt: Run Free Project provides an all-in-one digital commerce platform built exclusively for independent running specialty retailers. POS-integrated eCommerce with branded mobile loyalty apps.

name: Evrig Solutions
excerpt: Evrig is a Magento-focused eCommerce development agency with 11+ years of experience. Led by a two-time Magento Master. Adobe Silver Partner and Hyva Silver Partner.

name: AraGrow
excerpt: AraGrow is a Minneapolis-based technology consultancy offering custom web development, cloud infrastructure, AI integration, and fractional CTO services.

name: Shopify
excerpt: Shopify is a leading global commerce platform powering millions of merchants across 175+ countries. All-in-one tools for online, in-person, and omnichannel selling.

name: WooCommerce
excerpt: WooCommerce is the open-source ecommerce platform built on WordPress, powering 4M+ online stores and 31% of top ecommerce sites. Fully customizable with an extensive extension marketplace.

name: eStreamly
excerpt: eStreamly is a multichannel video commerce platform that transforms videos and livestreams into shoppable experiences with in-video checkout. AI-powered video creation.

name: Psyberware
excerpt: Psyberware is a digital advertising agency specializing in data-driven online advertising and maximizing profit for ecommerce merchants across Google, Facebook, Microsoft, and Amazon.

name: Shopware
excerpt: Shopware delivers high-performance B2C and B2B ecommerce solutions with headless, API-first architecture. Built-in AI automation, open-source, trusted by 55,000+ businesses globally.
